excerpt: As a result, Great Lakes Lifting grew more than 50% in revenue, successfully expanded from two to three locations, and set the foundation for continued scale.

Multi-location fleet management for equipment rental companies requires a unified view across regional branches; without it, teams portal-hop across OEM systems, hoard equipment locally, and miss cross-branch utilization opportunities.

Real-time visibility is no longer just an operational advantage. It has become part of the customer experience itself. The businesses that can quickly provide reliable availability information build trust faster and retain customers more effectively.
